item.title: Counterpoint：二季度中国手机出货量下降 2%，华为份额升至 23%
item.guid: Counterpoint：二季度中国手机出货量下降-2%，华为份额升至-23%
item.description:
Preliminary market monitoring data released yesterday by Counterpoint Research shows that China's smartphone shipments in Q2 2026 decreased by 2% year-on-year, and by 3% year-on-year in the first half. Continuously rising storage costs have prompted manufacturers to reduce production of low-end models, shift resources to higher-margin products, and initiate a second round of terminal price increases. Counterpoint Research 昨日发布的初步市场监测数据显示，2026 年第二季度中国智能手机出货量同比下降 2%，上半年同比下降 3%。持续上涨的存储成本促使厂商减少低端机型生产，把资源转向利润率更高的产品，并启动第二轮终端售价上调。

Huawei maintained its top position with a 23% market share, reaching a new high since Q4 2020, with shipments growing 24% year-on-year. Counterpoint attributed the growth to the performance of the Enjoy 90 Pro Max, Pura X Max, and the overall product portfolio. 华为以 23% 的市场份额保持第一，创 2020 年第四季度以来新高，出货量同比增长 24%。Counterpoint 将增长归因于畅享 90 Pro Max、Pura X Max 和整体产品组合表现。

Apple's shipments increased by 23% year-on-year; after widespread price increases in the Android camp, Apple's relatively stable pricing narrowed the price gap with high-end Android models, and some consumers' expectations of price increases in Q3 also released demand ahead of schedule. 苹果出货量同比增长 23%；安卓阵营普遍提价后，苹果相对稳定的定价缩小了与高端安卓机型的价差，部分消费者对第三季度涨价的预期也提前释放了需求。

OPPO, vivo, Xiaomi, and Honor primarily relied on new products such as Reno 16, S60, Redmi K90, and Magic V6 to maintain their presence in the mass and high-end markets. OPPO、vivo、小米和荣耀主要依靠 Reno 16、S60、红米 K90、Magic V6 等新品维持大众和高端市场。

Institutions expect that manufacturers can still digest the storage inventory purchased at the end of last year and Q1 this year, but new phones adopting higher-cost memory will be concentrated on the market in the second half, and price increase pressure may continue to suppress replacement demand. 机构预计，厂商在上半年仍能消化去年底和今年一季度采购的存储库存，但采用更高成本内存的新机将在下半年集中上市，涨价压力可能继续抑制换机需求。

item.title: 曝飞书二季度 ARR 同比增长超过 100%
item.guid: 曝飞书二季度-ARR-同比增长超过-100%
item.description:
According to sources cited by Cailian Press, as of the end of Q2 2026, Feishu's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) grew by over 100% year-on-year, reaching its highest growth rate since its commercialization. Feishu has not publicly responded to this data. 据财联社援引知情人士消息，截至 2026 年二季度末，飞书年度经常性收入（ARR）同比增长超过 100%，增速达到其商业化以来最高水平。飞书未就这一数据作出公开回应。

The report cited 36Kr, stating that among Feishu's new clients this year, over 90% also purchased Feishu AI products, and the client base has expanded from internet, new energy vehicle, and hard tech companies to retail, consumer, manufacturing, energy, and industrial enterprises. 报道援引 36 氪称，今年以来飞书新增客户中，超过九成同时采购了飞书 AI 产品，客户范围也从互联网、新能源汽车和硬科技公司延伸至零售、消费、制造、能源与工业企业。

item.title: 苹果在天才吧测试 AI 服务记录系统 Live Notes
item.guid: 苹果在天才吧测试-AI-服务记录系统-Live-Notes
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is testing Live Notes in some retail stores. With the consent of both employees and customers, the system records the Genius Bar service process, uses AI to transcribe and generate summaries, and then saves the employee-edited text to an internal system; original recordings are not retained, and managers cannot see the transcribed content. 据彭博社报道，苹果在部分零售店测试 Live Notes。员工与顾客双方同意后，系统会录制天才吧服务过程，用 AI 转写并生成摘要，再把经员工编辑的文本保存到内部系统；原始录音不会留存，管理人员也看不到转写内容。

Apple hopes employees spend less time handwriting notes during repairs and consultations. Some retail employees are concerned that these materials might later be used for coaching or performance reviews. Live Notes is not currently mandatory, and Apple has not decided whether to expand its use to more stores or change the purpose of the recordings. 苹果希望员工在维修和咨询时少花时间手写记录。部分零售员工担心，这些材料以后可能被用于辅导或绩效考核。Live Notes 目前不是强制项目，苹果尚未决定是否扩大门店范围或改变记录用途。

Employees can modify transcribed text and summaries before saving, and customers can also refuse to participate. The current pilot separates recording, transcription, editing, and internal archiving into different stages, with store managers only accessing the final service record. 员工可以在保存前修改转写文本与摘要，顾客也可以拒绝参与。当前试点把录音、转写、编辑和内部存档分成不同环节，门店管理者只接触最终服务记录。

item.title: 广汽本田与本田续签合资协议至 2038 年
item.guid: 广汽本田与本田续签合资协议至-2038-年
item.description:
GAC Group and Honda announced yesterday that they have officially signed a strategic renewal agreement, extending the joint venture partnership of GAC Honda, with equity ratios remaining unchanged and the joint venture term extended to 2038. 广汽集团与本田昨日宣布，双方已正式签署战略续约协议，延续广汽本田合资公司合作关系，股权比例保持不变，合资期限延长至 2038 年。

GAC Honda was established in 1998 and has cumulatively produced and sold over 11 million vehicles. After the renewal, both parties will focus on new energy transformation in the next phase, continuing to advance electrified products, intelligent technologies, and local R&D systems. 广汽本田成立于 1998 年，累计产销汽车已超过 1100 万辆。续约后，双方将把新能源转型作为下一阶段重点，继续推进电动化产品、智能化技术与本地研发体系。

item.title: Kimi 回应马斯克 2 万亿参数模型挑战：「欢迎加入 2 万亿+ 俱乐部」
item.guid: Kimi-回应马斯克-2-万亿参数模型挑战：「欢迎加入-2-万亿+-俱乐部」
item.description:
In response to Elon Musk's previous claim that his company is training a 2 trillion-parameter model that might surpass Kimi, Moonshot AI replied: "Welcome to the '2 trillion+' club." 针对马斯克此前称旗下公司正在训练一款 2 万亿参数模型、且可能超越 Kimi，月之暗面回应称：「欢迎加入『2 万亿+』俱乐部」。

Musk had previously publicly stated that his company is training a 2 trillion-parameter model, expected to complete initial training next week, and claimed that this model would be comprehensively superior to the 1.5 trillion-parameter version, potentially surpassing Kimi. 马斯克此前曾公开表示，旗下公司正在训练一款 2 万亿参数模型，预计于下周完成初步训练，并称该模型将全面优于 1.5 万亿参数版本，可能超越 Kimi。

On July 16, Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, officially stating that it has 2.8 trillion parameters, a 1 million token context window, and supports native multimodal capabilities. Musk subsequently described Kimi K3 as 'impressive'. 7 月 16 日，月之暗面发布 Kimi K3，官方称其拥有 2.8 万亿参数、100 万 token 上下文窗口，并支持原生多模态能力。马斯克随后评价 Kimi K3「impressive」（惊艳）。

item.title: 靳玉志：华为乾崑继续做汽车行业的「电子螺丝钉」
item.guid: 靳玉志：华为乾崑继续做汽车行业的「电子螺丝钉」
item.description:
Jin Yuzhi, Huawei Senior Vice President and CEO of Qiankun, stated in an interview with 36Kr Auto that Huawei Qiankun will not operate as an independent automotive brand, but will continue to provide platform capabilities such as intelligent driving, cockpit, and vehicle control. He referred to this positioning as the 'electronic screw' of the automotive industry: jointly defining products with car manufacturers, but not replacing them in brand operation. 华为高级副总裁、引望 CEO 靳玉志接受 36 氪汽车采访时表示，华为乾崑不会把业务做成独立汽车品牌，而是继续提供智驾、座舱和车控等平台能力。他把这种定位称为汽车行业的「电子螺丝钉」：与车企共同定义产品，但不替代车企经营品牌。

He stated that the 'Jie' series primarily covers the market above 300,000 yuan, while the 'Jing' series leans towards below 300,000 yuan, with both corresponding to different price segments and product forms. Huawei Qiankun has currently partnered with multiple car manufacturers, with over 50 related models. 他称，「界」系列主要覆盖 30 万元以上市场，「境」系列更偏向 30 万元以下，两者对应不同价格带和产品形态。华为乾崑目前已与多家车企合作，相关车型超过 50 款。

Jin Yuzhi estimated that fewer than 10% of users in China truly experience and continuously use assisted driving, so the company plans to lower the trial threshold through experience centers. He believes that L2 safety levels can approach 70% of manual driving, L3 needs to achieve about a tenfold safety gain, and L4 needs to further increase to a hundredfold level. 靳玉志估计，国内真正体验并持续使用辅助驾驶的用户仍不到 10%，因此公司准备通过体验中心降低试用门槛。他认为 L2 的安全水平可以接近人工驾驶的 70%，L3 需要达到约十倍安全增益，L4 则要继续提高到百倍级别。

Regarding investment, he stated that Huawei and Qiankun's cumulative investment in intelligent automotive solutions has exceeded 100 billion yuan, with a R&D budget of approximately 18 billion yuan in 2026, of which 7-8 billion yuan is for computing power; computing power investment will remain at approximately 7-8 billion yuan annually for the next five years. 投入方面，他称华为和引望在智能汽车解决方案上的累计投入已超过 1000 亿元，2026 年研发预算约 180 亿元，其中算力投入 70 亿至 80 亿元；未来五年算力投入仍将保持在每年约 70 亿至 80 亿元。

Regarding the relationship between L3 and L4, Jin Yuzhi believes they are different stages where responsibility gradually shifts from the driver to the system provider. Consumer-facing L4 cannot rely on fixed operating areas, so it needs to first complete regulatory, product, and user adaptation, and then expand from closed parks and low-speed scenarios to open roads. 对于 L3 与 L4 的关系，靳玉志认为两者是责任逐步从驾驶员转向系统提供方的不同阶段。面向消费者的 L4 不能依赖固定运营区域，因此需要先完成法规、产品和用户适应，再从封闭园区、低速场景向公开道路扩展。

item.title: 工信部：我国智能算力规模达到 2185 EFLOPS
item.guid: 工信部：我国智能算力规模达到-2185-EFLOPS
item.description:
The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology disclosed yesterday at a State Council Information Office press conference that China's intelligent computing power scale has reached 2185 EFLOPS (FP16), with an overall utilization rate of 71.4%; more than 70 high-speed computing network channels have been built nationwide, and network performance has improved by about 10% compared to before. 工业和信息化部昨日在国新办发布会上披露，我国智能算力规模已达到 2185 EFLOPS（FP16），整体利用率为 71.4%；全国已建成 70 多条算力网络高速通道，网络性能较此前提升约 10%。

In terms of software and open-source ecosystems, China's AI open-source models have accumulated over 10 billion downloads, and the number of open-source HarmonyOS ecosystem devices exceeds 1.35 billion. The National AI Open-Source Community has gathered 11 million users and over 70,000 models, with more than 50 open-source projects incubated by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology. 软件与开源生态方面，我国 AI 开源模型累计下载量超过 100 亿次，开源鸿蒙生态设备数量超过 13.5 亿台。国家人工智能开源社区已聚集 1100 万用户和 7 万多个模型，工业和信息化部孵化的开源项目超过 50 个。

The robotics industry has developed over 400 humanoid robot products, accounting for more than half of the global total, and sales of quadruped robots are close to 70% of the global market. The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology also stated that it will continue to promote research into new-generation network technologies such as 6G, optical communication, satellite communication, and integrated communication sensing and computing. 机器人产业已形成 400 多款人形机器人产品，约占全球一半以上，四足机器人销量接近全球七成。工业和信息化部还表示，将继续推进 6G、光通信、卫星通信和通信感知计算一体化等新一代网络技术研究。

item.title: 无问芯穹发布 Agentic Infra「前店后厂一中心」战略
item.guid: 无问芯穹发布-Agentic-Infra「前店后厂一中心」战略
item.description:
On July 20, Wuwenshinqiong released its Agentic Infra "Front Shop, Back Factory, One Center" strategy at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference. This strategy covers "Computing Power Distribution Centers," Agentic MaaS "Token Factories," and industry solution "AI Productivity Stores," targeting the training, inference, and application of AI agents. 7 月 20 日，无问芯穹在 2026 年世界人工智能大会上发布 Agentic Infra「前店后厂一中心」战略，涵盖「算力集散中心」、Agentic MaaS「Token 工厂」和行业解决方案「AI 生产力商店」，面向 AI 智能体的训练、推理与应用。

The company stated that its cross-domain training system covers over 37,000P of computing power and 16 mainstream chip types; the new generation cross-cluster heterogeneous PD separation architecture PDD can reduce first-token latency by 51.5% and single-token cost by 37.5%. As of July, the daily token invocation volume of the Agentic MaaS platform has increased 40-fold compared to December last year. 公司称，其跨域训练系统已覆盖超过 37,000P 算力和 16 种主流芯片；新一代跨集群异构 PD 分离架构 PDD 可将首 Token 延迟降低 51.5%，单 Token 成本降低 37.5%。截至 7 月，Agentic MaaS 平台单日 Token 调用量较去年 12 月增长 40 倍。

In addition, Wuwenshinqiong released an infrastructure intelligent agent swarm and a cloud-edge-device integrated management platform for embodied AI. The company stated that its embodied AI inference optimization system, Mizar-Robo, can reduce edge-side inference latency from 500 milliseconds to 70 milliseconds, improving performance by 7.14 times. 此外，无问芯穹发布了基础设施智能体蜂群，以及面向具身智能的云边端一体化管理平台。公司称，具身智能推理优化体系 Mizar-Robo 可将端侧推理时延从 500 毫秒降至 70 毫秒，性能提升 7.14 倍。

item.title: 李开复旗下零一万物筹备 2027 年赴港上市
item.guid: 李开复旗下零一万物筹备-2027-年赴港上市
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Kai-Fu Lee's 01.AI is advancing pre-IPO financing and plans to list in Hong Kong as early as 2027. The company hopes to complete this round of financing around the time its first annual results are disclosed, but has not yet announced a target amount or potential investors. 据彭博社报道，李开复创办的零一万物正推进上市前融资，并计划最早于 2027 年在香港上市。公司希望在披露首份年度业绩前后完成这轮融资，目前尚未公布目标金额或潜在投资者。

01.AI is headquartered in Beijing, with its business covering large models and enterprise-level AI applications. This financing round will provide capital for IPO preparation and business expansion, with the company's given IPO timeline being as early as 2027. 零一万物总部位于北京，业务覆盖大模型和企业级 AI 应用。此次融资将为上市准备和业务扩张补充资金，公司给出的上市时间表为最早 2027 年。

item.title: 红熊 AI 完成数亿元 A+ 轮融资
item.guid: 红熊-AI-完成数亿元-A+-轮融资
item.description:
Red Bear AI announced yesterday the completion of a Series A+ financing round worth hundreds of millions of RMB, with a post-investment valuation approaching 3 billion RMB. This round was jointly invested by Zhejiang Jiuwei Private Equity Fund, Jiaxing Zhangyuan Venture Capital, and existing shareholder Geruifeng, marking the company's sixth round of financing completed within 15 months. 红熊 AI 昨日宣布完成数亿元人民币 A+ 轮融资，投后估值接近 30 亿元。本轮由浙江九纬私募基金、嘉兴彰元创业投资和老股东格睿丰联合投资，是公司 15 个月内完成的第六轮融资。

The funds will be used for the integration of the OpenBear general model, MemoryBear memory system, and native Agent architecture, as well as expanding four types of businesses: intelligent customer service, intelligent marketing, ChatBI, and intelligent education. 资金将用于 OpenBear 通用模型、MemoryBear 记忆系统和原生 Agent 架构的融合，并扩大智能客服、智能营销、ChatBI 与智能教育四类业务。

MemoryBear manages working memory, short-term memory, and long-term memory in a layered manner, and uses temporal memory, dynamic semantic networks, and semantic pruning to reduce information forgetting and token consumption in long-term conversations. MemoryBear 把工作记忆、短期记忆和长期记忆分层管理，并用时间记忆、动态语义网络和语义剪枝降低长期对话中的信息遗忘与 Token 消耗。

OpenBear adopts an MoE sparse expert architecture and reserves interfaces for interaction with external memory systems. MemoryBear also combines the Ebbinghaus forgetting curve with an activation model to regularly prune outdated, redundant, and incorrect information, allowing agents to maintain timelines and knowledge relationships in long-term tasks. OpenBear 采用 MoE 稀疏专家架构，并预留与外部记忆系统交互的接口。MemoryBear 还结合艾宾浩斯遗忘曲线与激活度模型，对过时、重复和错误信息进行定期剪枝，让 Agent 在长期任务中维护时间线与知识关系。

item.title: 💡 Google DeepMind CEO 哈萨比斯：AI 不会让 STEM 和计算机科学学位失去价值
item.guid: 💡-Google-DeepMind-CEO-哈萨比斯：AI-不会让-STEM-和计算机科学学位失去价值
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Demis Hassabis, CEO of Google DeepMind, stated at a business conference in London that AI is changing career paths in the tech industry, but STEM degrees and foundational computer science knowledge will not lose their value as a result. 据《商业内幕》报道，谷歌 DeepMind CEO 德米斯·哈萨比斯在伦敦一场商业会议上表示，AI 正在改变科技行业的职业路径，但 STEM 学位和计算机科学基础不会因此失去价值。

Hassabis believes that individuals with a grasp of software engineering and computer science fundamentals can use AI tools more efficiently. He mentioned that programming languages have evolved from machine code to C, then to Python, and may further shift towards using English for programming in the future. 哈萨比斯认为，掌握软件工程和计算机科学基础的人，能够更高效地使用 AI 工具。他提到，编程语言已经历从机器码到 C 语言、再到 Python 的演变，未来可能进一步转向使用英语进行编程。

People who truly deeply understand technology may use AI tools 10 times more efficiently than those lacking a technical foundation. 真正深入理解技术的人，使用 AI 工具的效率可能达到缺乏技术基础者的 10 倍。

He also stated that the AI era requires humanities and social sciences such as ethics, philosophy, and economics to address new problems brought about by technological development. 他同时表示，AI 时代也需要伦理学、哲学、经济学等人文学科和社会科学，以应对技术发展带来的新问题。

item.title: 润科具能发布轮足复合「半人马」机器人
item.guid: 润科具能发布轮足复合「半人马」机器人
item.description:
Runke Juneng unveiled the "Centaur" wheeled-legged composite robot at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, targeting special scenarios such as steelmaking, mining, nuclear industry, field inspection, and fire rescue. 润科具能在 2026 世界人工智能大会发布轮足复合机器人「半人马」，面向炼钢、矿山、核工业、野外巡检和消防救援等特种场景。

    Mobility: The lower body adopts a four-wheeled leg structure, balancing flat ground speed with the ability to traverse stairs, mountain roads, and icy/snowy surfaces.

    Operation: The upper body can be extended with dual arms, dexterous hands, and force sensors, supporting grasping, twisting, carrying, and valve operation.

    Load: Average load 100 to 120kg, extreme static load 210kg.

    Perception: Integrates lidar, stereo vision, and depth cameras to autonomously identify pipelines, instruments, obstacles, and personnel, and complete path planning.

The entire machine is designed according to explosion-proof standards and can be remotely taken over by personnel to perform obstacle removal, maintenance, and material handling after detecting anomalies. 整机按防爆等级设计，可在发现异常后由远程人员接管执行清障、检修和物资搬运。

item.title: 三星显示量产 True Black 1400 笔记本 OLED 面板
item.guid: 三星显示量产-True-Black-1400-笔记本-OLED-面板
item.description:
Samsung Display announced the full supply of VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 compliant tandem notebook OLED panels, with the first certified product being the Lenovo YOGA Pro 16 Aura 2026; products from ASUS, Dell, and MSI will adopt them sequentially from the second half of this year to next year. 三星显示宣布全面供应符合 VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 的串联式笔记本 OLED 面板，首款认证产品为联想 YOGA Pro 16 Aura 2026；华硕、戴尔和微星产品将在今年下半年至明年陆续采用。

The new panel has a peak brightness of 1600 nits, more than 40% higher than the 1100 nits of traditional single-layer OLEDs; the standard requires 1400 nits at a 10% pixel ratio and black level brightness controlled below 0.0005 nits. 新面板峰值亮度为 1600nit，比传统单层 OLED 的 1100nit 高出 40% 以上；标准要求在 10% 开启像素比下达到 1400nit，并把黑场亮度控制在 0.0005nit 以下。

Samsung Display states that the new organic materials allow the panel's lifespan at typical office brightness to be more than double that of traditional structures. 三星显示称，新有机材料让面板在典型办公亮度下的寿命达到传统结构两倍以上。

item.title: 字节跳动发布 Seed Audio 1.0 音频创作模型
item.guid: 字节跳动发布-Seed-Audio-1.0-音频创作模型
item.description:
ByteDance's Seed team yesterday released Seed Audio 1.0, using a unified framework to simultaneously model human voices, sound effects, and ambient sounds, and organizing characters, dialogue, emotions, background, and sound entry timing with a single command. 字节跳动 Seed 团队昨日发布 Seed Audio 1.0，用统一框架同时建模人声、音效和环境声，用一条指令组织角色、台词、情绪、背景与声音进场时机。

    Time Control: The model breaks down creative intent into a structured timeline, currently supporting 100ms interval precision.

    Timbre and Duration: Supports text or reference audio input, generating approximately 2 minutes of audio per single instance, which can be further extended while maintaining consistent character timbre and expression.

    Multilingual: Covers over 20 languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish, allowing the same timbre to adjust rhythm, accent, and emotion according to the target language.

The official team conducted evaluations in scenarios such as film and television, animation, podcast dialogues, live e-commerce, dramas, and speech synthesis, stating that the audio availability rate exceeds 90% in most scenarios. Seed Audio 1.0 has been launched at the Volcengine Ark Experience Center; future plans include supporting video reference, long audio, and multi-track input and generation methods. 官方在影视、动漫、播客对话、直播带货、话剧和语音合成等场景进行评测，称多数场景的音频可用率超过 90%。Seed Audio 1.0 已在火山方舟体验中心上线；后续计划支持视频参考、长音频和分轨等输入与生成方式。

item.title: 大晓机器人发布三套具身智能行业方案
item.guid: 大晓机器人发布三套具身智能行业方案
item.description:
Daxiao Robotics unveiled three embodied AI industry solutions, "Xiaoman," "Xiaoxin," and "Xiaotu," at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference, targeting instant retail fulfillment, hotel laundry services, and autonomous operations in open environments, respectively. 大晓机器人在世界人工智能大会发布「晓满」「晓新」「晓途」三套具身智能行业方案，分别面向即时零售履约、酒店洗衣服务和开放场景自主作业。

    Xiaoman: Uses W1 fulfillment robots for flash warehouses, front-end warehouses, integrated store-warehouses, and unmanned convenience stores; the robot body can pass through 75cm narrow aisles, has a self-weight to payload ratio of less than 2, force control accuracy no higher than 1N, and is already operating in Shaomaigou, Kuaikeda, and Sinopec convenience stores.

    Xiaoxin: Enables robots to sequentially handle clothing collection, placement, washing, folding, and ironing, primarily addressing continuous tasks generated by hotel night laundry and peak check-in periods.

    Xiaotu: Provides indoor and outdoor navigation, dynamic and static obstacle avoidance, long-range task orchestration, and cluster scheduling on multi-modal quadruped robots, already used in scenarios such as Shanghai West Bund Riverside, Fuxing Island, and Tianjin Begonia Festival.

The company plans to enter 1,000 retail scenarios in the next year and expand to 10,000 stores within two years, collaborating with China National Petroleum Corporation, Kuaikeda, SenseTime ShanHui, and multiple cloud service providers to build deployment and computing power systems. 公司计划未来一年进入 1000 家零售场景、两年拓展至 1 万家量级门店，并与中国石油、快客达、商汤善惠及多家云服务商合作建设部署与算力体系。

item.title: 至简动力北大联合实验室发布世界动作模型 HarmoWAM
item.guid: 至简动力北大联合实验室发布世界动作模型-HarmoWAM
item.description:
ZhiJian Power and Peking University Joint Lab proposed the robot world action model HarmoWAM, using two experts with different divisions of labor to handle long-range movement and fine manipulation. 至简动力与北京大学联合实验室提出机器人世界动作模型 HarmoWAM，用两个分工不同的专家处理长程移动和精细操作。

The reactive expert plans cross-regional movements based on explicitly predicted future frames, while the predictive expert reads spatiotemporal features in the latent space to complete high-precision actions such as grasping, pouring, and writing; a gating module dynamically switches between the two based on the current frame and task stage. 反应式专家根据显式预测的未来画面规划跨区域移动，预测式专家读取隐空间的时空特征完成抓取、倾倒、书写等高精度动作；门控模块会根据当前画面和任务阶段动态切换两者。

The model uses Wan2.2-TI2V-5B as the world model backbone, pre-trained on approximately 1.9 million robot trajectories, predicting 13 future frames each time and outputting actions at 48Hz. 模型以 Wan2.2-TI2V-5B 为世界模型骨干，在约 190 万条机器人轨迹上预训练，每次预测未来 13 帧，并以 48Hz 输出动作。

The team tested six real-world tasks: fruit placement, can stacking, pouring water, writing "Yes," flower arranging, and zipping bags. The average success rate within the distribution was 89%, higher than the control model π0.5's 74%; the average success rate after changing background, position, or objects was 82%. 团队在水果放置、易拉罐堆叠、倒水、书写「Yes」、插花和装袋拉链六项真机任务中测试：分布内平均成功率为 89%，高于对照模型 π0.5 的 74%；更换背景、位置或物体后的平均成功率为 82%。

item.title: 纪念《宝可梦》诞生 30 周年，Steiff 推出限量皮卡丘玩偶
item.guid: 纪念《宝可梦》诞生-30-周年，Steiff-推出限量皮卡丘玩偶
item.description:
To commemorate the 30th anniversary of "Pokémon," German doll brand Steiff launched a global limited edition of 1,996 Pikachu collectible plush toys, with the number corresponding to the year "Pokémon" first debuted in 1996. The plush toy is approximately 21 cm tall, made of yellow mohair material, and features a gold-plated "ear tag" trademark. 为纪念《宝可梦》诞生 30 周年，德国玩偶品牌 Steiff 推出全球限量 1,996 体的皮卡丘珍藏玩偶，数量对应《宝可梦》于 1996 年首次亮相的年份。玩偶高约 21 厘米，采用黄色马海毛材质制作，并配有金色镀层「耳扣」商标。

The first batch of 350 numbered dolls will be exclusively available on the Steiff official website and in European stores starting July 24; from August 3, the products will be available at select retailers worldwide. 首批 350 体带序列编号的玩偶将于 7 月 24 日起，在 Steiff 官网及欧洲门店独家发售；8 月 3 日起，产品将在全球部分零售商处上架。

item.title: 国铁 12306 试点提前 60 天预约京沪方向车票
item.guid: 国铁-12306-试点提前-60-天预约京沪方向车票
item.description:
According to CCTV News, starting yesterday, over 200 trains on the Beijing-Shanghai High-Speed Railway and Beijing-Shanghai Railway are piloting reservation ticket purchases via the Railway 12306 mobile app. The service collects travel demands before the normal pre-sale period begins, with the railway department coordinating capacity and ticket allocation, and then providing feedback on the fulfillment results at the agreed time. 据央视新闻报道，从昨日起，京沪高铁、京沪铁路的 200 多趟列车在铁路 12306 手机客户端试点预约购票。服务在正常预售期开始前收集乘车需求，由铁路部门统筹运力与票额，再在约定时间反馈兑现结果。

July 20 to August 29 is the transition period, during which passengers can sequentially book tickets for September 15 and beyond. Starting August 30, regular reservations can be made for tickets from the 60th day to the 17th day before departure; reservation orders for the 60th day before departure can be submitted daily from 8:00 AM. 7 月 20 日至 8 月 29 日为过渡期，旅客可依次预约 9 月 15 日及之后的车票。8 月 30 日起，可常态化预约开车前第 60 天至第 17 天的车票；每日 8 时起可提交开车前第 60 天的预约订单。

Orders currently do not support modification after submission; if travel plans change, they can be canceled and resubmitted before fulfillment. For reserved tickets, a 5% refund fee based on the ticket price will be charged for cancellations made between the 20th and 8th day before departure; for cancellations within 8 days before departure, the current rules apply. 订单提交后暂不支持修改，行程变化时可在兑现前取消并重新提交。预约车票在开车前第 20 天至第 8 天退票，按票面价格 5% 收取退票费；开车前 8 天内则沿用现行规则。

item.title: 《复仇者联盟 5》首曝预告
item.guid: 《复仇者联盟-5》首曝预告
item.description:
Marvel Studios yesterday released the first official trailer for "Avengers 5: Doom Day," with the film scheduled for a global release in December 2026. The trailer, approximately 2 minutes and 25 seconds long, focuses on the impending "Doom Day" and the assembly of heroes from different factions. 漫威影业昨天发布《复仇者联盟 5：毁灭之日》首支正式预告，影片计划于 2026 年 12 月全球上映。预告片时长约 2 分 25 秒，聚焦即将到来的「毁灭之日」以及来自不同阵营的英雄集结。

The film will revolve around the Avengers confronting this villain, with the story involving a multiverse crisis. The trailer also features characters related to the Fantastic Four, as well as footage or clues related to characters like the X-Men and Loki. 影片将围绕复仇者联盟对抗这一反派展开，故事涉及多元宇宙危机。预告中还出现了神奇四侠相关角色，以及 X 战警、洛基等角色的相关画面或线索。

item.title: 法院要求派拉蒙暂停 1100 亿美元收购华纳兄弟
item.guid: 法院要求派拉蒙暂停-1100-亿美元收购华纳兄弟
item.description:
According to Reuters, a U.S. federal judge ruled on Monday that Paramount Global's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery must be paused until August 3. California, along with 11 other states including New York and Colorado, filed a lawsuit on July 13, arguing that the merger would weaken competition in the film and television markets. 据路透社报道，美国联邦法官周一裁定，派拉蒙天舞对华纳兄弟探索的 1100 亿美元收购必须暂停至 8 月 3 日。加利福尼亚州与纽约、科罗拉多等 11 个州于 7 月 13 日起诉，认为合并会削弱电影和电视市场竞争。

The judge believes that the states have strongly demonstrated that the transaction may be illegal; if the merger is completed first, changes such as layoffs and sharing of commercially sensitive information would be difficult to reverse afterward. The states claim that the merged company could account for approximately 27% of the widely distributed film market. 法官认为，各州已经有力证明交易可能违法；如果先完成合并，裁员、分享商业敏感信息等改变很难事后撤销。各州称，合并后公司可能占广泛发行电影市场约 27%。

The court will reconsider on August 3 whether to extend the pause throughout the litigation. According to the transaction agreement, if the closing is delayed beyond September 30, Paramount CEO David Ellison must pay Warner Bros. shareholders $0.25 per share for each calendar day, totaling approximately $7 million. 法院将于 8 月 3 日再审理是否在整个诉讼期间延续暂停。按交易协议，如果交割延迟到 9 月 30 日之后，派拉蒙 CEO 大卫·埃里森每个日历日需向华纳兄弟股东支付每股 0.25 美元，合计约 700 万美元。

item.title: Netflix 为 200 小时儿童内容增加美国手语演绎
item.guid: Netflix-为-200-小时儿童内容增加美国手语演绎
item.description:
According to IndieWire, Netflix has partnered with accessibility technology company SignUp Media to produce American Sign Language (ASL) interpretations for approximately 200 hours of children's and family content. 据 IndieWire 报道，Netflix 与无障碍技术公司 SignUp Media 达成合作，为约 200 小时的儿童与家庭内容制作美国手语（ASL）演绎。

The first batch covers 73 titles from 41 series or IPs, including "Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio," "The Sea Beast," "Pokémon Horizons," "The New Magic School Bus," "Cocomelon Lane," and "The Mitchells vs. the Machines." The related content began rolling out yesterday. 首批覆盖 41 个系列或 IP 的 73 部作品，包括《吉尔莫·德尔·托罗之匹诺曹》《海兽猎人》《宝可梦：地平线》《新神奇校车》《可可瓜儿歌街》和《智能大反攻》，相关内容已于昨日开始上线。

These ASL videos play synchronously with Netflix's main content via SignUp's Chrome extension. The ASL interpretation window can be moved, resized, split-screened, or popped out, eliminating the need for users to find a separate "ASL version" entry. SignUp also plans to extend the functionality to TV and mobile devices and add ASL interpretations for trailers. 这些手语视频通过 SignUp 的 Chrome 扩展与 Netflix 正片同步播放。手语演绎窗口可以移动、调整大小、分屏或弹出，用户无需另找一个独立的「手语版」条目。SignUp 还计划把功能扩展到电视和移动设备，并加入预告片手语演绎。
